built form.

A practical, exterior-focused encyclopedia of 30 architectural styles, from antiquity to today — façade, massing, materials, colour, lighting, checklists and AI prompts. Choose a design direction for any project, in minutes.

Architectural Styles

Each style is documented across twelve practical, exterior-focused sections — from façade detailing to night-lighting strategy.

1920s – 1970s

Modern

Clean lines, functional forms, no ornament.

Europe → GlobalRational
2000s – present

Contemporary

Current trends, evolving — mixed materials, clean geometry.

GlobalCurrent
1980s – present

Minimalism

Simplicity — 'less is more'.

GlobalPure
1950s – present

Scandinavian

Simplicity, functionality, nature.

Nordic EuropeSimple
1990s – present

Japanese Minimalism

Harmony, simplicity, nature.

JapanHarmonious
1980s – present

Mediterranean Contemporary

Warm, relaxed, timeless — stucco walls and clean forms.

Mediterranean · GlobalWarm
